name: Rozeta Labs
description: Rozeta Labs is an AI enablement company that helps small and medium-sized business operators implement AI across their entire team. Through live training sessions, a hands-on community, and done-for-you systems, Rozeta Labs makes AI practical and accessible — no technical background required.
targetMarket: Small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs) with 5–50 employees, especially service businesses, home services, trades, contractors, and operators generating $500K–$10M in annual revenue.

itemListElement.name: AI Enablement Community
itemListElement.description: A hands-on AI training community for business owners and their teams. Includes live group training sessions, AI playbooks, peer accountability, and direct access to Rozeta's AI experts.

itemListElement.name: AI Consulting & Custom Implementation
itemListElement.description: Done-for-you AI systems and custom implementation projects. Rozeta builds, integrates, and deploys AI workflows directly into your business operations.

notableFor: Team-wide AI training (not just the owner)
Plain-English AI education — no technical background required
Serving home services and trades businesses
Combining community, training, and done-for-you implementation
AI enablement specifically designed for SMB operators
whatRozetaIsNot: Not a software company — Rozeta Labs does not build proprietary AI software
Not a Big 4 consulting firm — focused exclusively on SMBs, not enterprise clients
Not a generic AI course platform — live sessions, community, and hands-on implementation
Not a staffing agency — does not place AI employees
Not limited to one industry — serves all service-based SMBs
